category_title: Medium-proficiency international students struggling with sentence structure and translation
scenario_title: Revising essay drafts with persistent run-on sentences and repeated words
minimal_context: The student is reviewing the second draft of their essay to correct run-on sentences and repeated words.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's review the second draft of your essay and work on correcting the run-on sentences and repeated words.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: When you revised my essay I understood all my errors and those were mostly the run-on and repeated sentences. So, I have to work a lot to improve my essay.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should do next to fix them?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Writing was very hard as I imagined. Since I am not a good talker, I had troubles with expressing my thoughts in a proper way.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just keep trying to rewrite the sentences.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: But after the revision of my second draft, I found more errors and they were the same, but this time it was run-on sentences and repeated words. I found it hard because there were errors in almost all my essay and I was difficult for me to correct my essay. Because of the problems with use of English language, I lost confidence in writing.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's review the second draft of your essay and work on correcting the run-on sentences and repeated words.

STUDENT: When you revised my essay I understood all my errors and those were mostly the run-on and repeated sentences. So, I have to work a lot to improve my essay.

TUTOR: What do you think you should do next to fix them?

STUDENT: Writing was very hard as I imagined. Since I am not a good talker, I had troubles with expressing my thoughts in a proper way.

TUTOR: Just keep trying to rewrite the sentences.

STUDENT: But after the revision of my second draft, I found more errors and they were the same, but this time it was run-on sentences and repeated words. I found it hard because there were errors in almost all my essay and I was difficult for me to correct my essay. Because of the problems with use of English language, I lost confidence in writing.

task.content: Revising the second draft of an essay to correct run-on sentences and repeated words
task.learning_goal: Improve the essay by correcting errors

context.time_context: After the revision of the second draft

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: After the revision of the second draft, finding more errors and they were the same, specifically run-on sentences and repeated words
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Expressing difficulty in correcting the essay, stating 'I found it hard because there were errors in almost all my essay'
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Because of the problems with use of English language, I lost confidence in writing.
related_quotes: I found it hard because there were errors in almost all my essay and I was difficult for me to correct my essay.
But after the revision of my second draft, I found more errors and they were the same, but this time it was run-on sentences and repeated words.

behavior_patterns.condition: Because of the problems with use of English language
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Having troubles with expressing thoughts in a proper way
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Writing was very hard as I imagined.
related_quotes: Since I am not a good talker, I had troubles with expressing my thoughts in a proper way.
